resources.string: Fire OS companion · passive arsenal · CYD bridge

Every offensive module is gated. On Fire OS this companion unlocks BLUE TEAM only.

• Use only on networks/devices you own or have written permission to test.
• Stock Fire OS cannot run ESP32 HaleHound firmware.
• Deauth / evil twin / SubGHz / NRF24 / NFC clone require a real CYD.
• Unauthorized attacks on third-party networks are illegal.

ACCEPT = Blue Team passive arsenal on this tablet.
DECLINE = exit.
No HaleHound CYD discovered on local network
Connect the CYD AP or join the same LAN, then Discover.
Passive / Blue Team mode (stock Fire OS)
